name: Fall Armyworm
symptoms: Ragged holes in leaves, skeletonized leaf whorls, and sawdust-like larval droppings.
treatment: Apply neem-based organic extracts or specific biopesticides early in the morning.

name: stem Borer
symptoms: Curled or yellowed leaves, stunted crop growth, and sticky honey-dew secretions.
treatment: Introduce natural predators like ladybugs or spray a mild soapy water solution.
